title: thevetia bicornuta
intro: Thevetia bicornuta, also known as the Yellow Card, is a plant species native to South America, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of thevetin and other compounds. The health benefits of Thevetia bicornuta include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Thevetia bicornuta is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
